scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp announce.html dist/ && cp meeting.html dist/ && cp meeting.js dist/ && cp meeting.css dist/ && cp success.html dist/ && cp cancel.html dist/ && cp deal-room.html dist/ && cp fulfillment.html dist/ && cp marketplace.html dist/ && cp meeting-room.html dist/ && cp CNAME dist/ && touch dist/.nojekyll
scripts.test: python3 -m py_compile backend/server.py && node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js supabase/functions/createHandshakeSession.js supabase/functions/createStripeCheckout.js supabase/functions/stripeWebhook.js supabase/functions/aiAgentAnalyze.js supabase/functions/newsWebhook.js supabase/functions/generatePressRelease.js supabase/functions/syndicateAnnouncement.js supabase/functions/generateInstantRoom.js supabase/functions/documentBridge.js supabase/functions/aiSecretaryTools.js supabase/functions/aiComplianceLawyer.js supabase/functions/marketplaceEngine.js supabase/functions/auditContractCompliance.js supabase/functions/supplyChainCoordinator.js supabase/functions/dealClearanceRoom.js supabase/functions/dealFulfillment.js supabase/functions/stripeConnectOnboard.js supabase/functions/meetingRoom.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const schemaSql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); const migrationSql = readFileSync('supabase/migrations/03_platform_core.sql', 'utf8'); for (const [label, sql] of [['schema.sql', schemaSql], ['03_platform_core.sql', migrationSql]]) { if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error(label + ' missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error(label + ' missing entry_fee_status field'); if (!sql.includes('deal_announcements')) throw new Error(label + ' missing deal_announcements table'); if (!sql.includes('global_news')) throw new Error(label + ' missing global_news table'); if (!sql.includes('instant_rooms')) throw new Error(label + ' missing instant_rooms table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_logs')) throw new Error(label + ' missing compliance_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('marketplace_listings')) throw new Error(label + ' missing marketplace_listings table'); if (!sql.includes('user_profiles')) throw new Error(label + ' missing user_profiles table'); if (!sql.includes('legal_audit_logs')) throw new Error(label + ' missing legal_audit_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_chain_tracking')) throw new Error(label + ' missing supply_chain_tracking table'); if (!sql.includes('deal_clearances')) throw new Error(label + ' missing deal_clearances table'); if (!sql.includes('deal_fulfillments')) throw new Error(label + ' missing deal_fulfillments table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_memos')) throw new Error(label + ' missing meeting_memos table'); } console.log('Greens ACC validation passed');"
